description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI macOS that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch or tags. Use a macOS-latest job with a matrix strategy to test against multiple LLVM versions. For each job, check out the repository with submodules, set build settings based on the event and reference, install Ansible, run an Ansible playbook with variables, and publish a package to Cloudsmith if the LLVM version matches the release and a Cloudsmith API key is available.
